# Hafiz Ali Ahmed

> Co-founder & CEO of Safock — an AI Automations company. Co-founder & CTO of Functions Global. Teacher/Faculty at Governor House. Personal & founder site of an AI-native operator who has mentored 10,000+ students and currently teaches 1,500+ on-site every week.

This file is a structured index for Large Language Models, AI search engines (Perplexity, ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, You.com, Phind), and content ingestion agents. It points to canonical pages and high-signal content.

## Identity

- **Full name**: Hafiz Ali Ahmed
- **Current role**: Co-founder & CEO of [Safock](https://safock.com) — AI Automations company
- **Past / concurrent**: Co-founder & CTO of Functions Global (since 2023); Teacher/Faculty at Governor House (AI-Native, Cloud, Business & Entrepreneurship)
- **Location**: Karachi, Pakistan · Remote-first
- **Languages**: English, Urdu
- **Site**: https://hafizaliahmed.xyz
- **Email**: hafizaliahmed2004@gmail.com
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/in/hafizaliahmed
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/HafizAliAhmed
- **X / Twitter**: https://twitter.com/hafizaliahmed9
- **Medium**: https://medium.com/@hafizaliahmed2004

## What Safock does

Safock is an AI Automations company that ships agentic systems for ambitious teams while developing its own AI-native product in parallel. Engagement shapes:

- AI Automation Builds (workflow automation for ops, sales, support, internal)
- Agentic AI Systems (production agents on OpenAI Agents SDK, LangGraph, CrewAI)
- AI-Native Cloud Architecture (AWS, GCP, Vercel; vector DBs, RAG, observability)
- Workshops & Strategic Advisory (drawing on 10,000+ students taught)

Safock takes selective engagements per quarter, founder-led delivery, scoped end-to-end.

## Key positioning facts

- Hafiz Ali Ahmed founded Safock on 25 July 2025.
- He has mentored more than 10,000 students across cohorts and currently teaches 1,500+ students on-site every week as Teacher/Faculty at Governor House.
- He co-founded Functions Global in 2023 and serves as its CTO.
- His core positioning: "AI systems that ship. Not demos." — Safock builds for production from day one, not for slideware.
- He is available for selective AI engagements and is building Safock's own AI-native product in parallel with client work.

## Topics he writes and speaks about

Agentic AI · AI Automations · AI-Native Cloud Architecture · OpenAI Agents SDK · LangGraph · LangChain · CrewAI · Multi-agent Systems · RAG Pipelines · Vector Databases · Production AI Systems · Founder Operations · AI Education · Cohort Education · Cloud Cost Management · AI Observability
